title: Content Repurposing
description: Takes existing content (blog post, video transcript, podcast) and repurposes it into X thread + LinkedIn post + newsletter. Exercises all format templates.

nodes.title: Upload Source Content
nodes.prompt: Ask the user: what content should we repurpose? Suggest: (A) Paste a blog post URL or text, (B) Upload a video transcript, (C) Paste a podcast transcript or notes, (D) Reference an existing platform file by title.

options.label: Paste a blog post URL or text
Paste a podcast transcript or notes
Reference an existing platform file by title

nodes.title: Extract Core Ideas
nodes.prompt: Read the source content. Extract: main argument, 3 key proof points, the aha/meaning, best hook line. Identify which format each idea fits best.

nodes.title: Choose Output Formats
nodes.prompt: Show the extracted ideas. Ask the user: which formats should we repurpose into? Suggest: (A) X Thread + LinkedIn Post, (B) X Thread only, (C) LinkedIn Post only, (D) Newsletter, (E) All formats.

humanQuestions.question: Which formats should we repurpose into?

nodes.title: Write Repurposed Drafts
nodes.prompt: Write drafts for each chosen format. X thread: use x-thread template. LinkedIn: use linkedin-post template. Newsletter: use email-newsletter template. Apply voice match and full frontmatter to each.

nodes.title: Approve & Publish
nodes.prompt: Show all repurposed drafts. Ask: (A) Publish all, (B) Publish specific formats only, (C) Edit and republish, (D) Hold all.

humanQuestions.question: What should happen to the repurposed drafts?

options.label: Hold all
options.description: Keep every draft for manual review.

nodes.title: Dispatch
nodes.prompt: Build publish packages for approved drafts and dispatch.
